text: >> Hi, my name is Sandy and I'm with AutoCare. >> Can I just say the message? >> They don't want to be in your area. >> Yeah, they don't want to be over-leaving for your auto insurance. >> And do you want to help you find a better rate? Just to make sure we're finding either right quote, may I ask how old you are? >> To leave a message for someone else, press 2. >> To disconnect, press star 9 or just hang up. >> Sorry, I didn't catch that. You do currently have active auto insurance on your vehicle. >> Correct. >> To disconnect, press star 9 or just hang up.
